gluten_free: A full bodied non-alcoholic red wine for any occasion. Our Non-alcoholic Pinot Noir has smooth velvety tannins with lovely notes of cranberry, plum and blackberry. Well rounded in terms of tannins, fruit and acid ratio. The perfect wine for any crowd.

gluten_free: A complex, smoky, & layered NA red unlike any other. Dark fruit meets smooth vanilla, rich oak, smoke & spice. Not a varietal. A completely unique sip.
column21: {"composition":"Grapes: We chose a blend of premium, locally-sourced Cabernet Sauvignon & Petite Sirah. Cabernet Sauvignon was chosen for its fresh dark fruit character and Petite Sirah for its bold tannins and spicy finish. Oak character: We added a blend of French and American Oak to smooth out the tannins and deliver a velvety vanilla flavor. Earthiness: Feeling that we needed more body we incorporated a tea blend to round out the mouthfeel. Puerh Tea, a fermented tea, was specifically used to add a layer of “earthiness” and Lapsang Souchong was chosen to compliment the spice of the Petite Sirah. Balance: The addition of premium cocoa mostly interplays with the wine and the oak to provide balance."}
